summary: This document contains draft video scripts for a Y Combinator pitch presentation by KeepMeCompany founders Eduardo and Rodrigo. It outlines the company's mission to reduce unnecessary senior doctor visits and provide AI companionship, including background on the founders' previous experience at Uber and Cornershop.
